text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, this feels nice... I'm so fired up, even my
fingertips're getting hot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! As if! I'm burnin' up with anticipation for
the fierce battle ahead!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm letting a repeat of last time
happen!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And I'll prove it to you right now!
